title: 'uwts #0213
definition:
1) to press, be pressed, make haste, urge, be narrow
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to press, hasten
        1a2) to be pressed, confined, narrow
        1a3) to hasten, make haste
        1a4) be narrow
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to urge, insist
        1b2) to hasten

    NASB:  to press, be pressed, make haste
